name: guidepup-macos-prototype
description: Prototype for running Guidepup on macOS in GitHub Actions with audio and video artifacts.

scripts.build:audio-probe: mkdir -p artifacts/module-cache && CLANG_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=artifacts/module-cache swiftc -parse-as-library scripts/SystemAudioProbe.swift -framework ScreenCaptureKit -framework AVFoundation -framework CoreMedia -framework CoreGraphics -o artifacts/system-audio-probe
